body.title: [sprint] Funnel-as-CI — one-command versioned builder eval over a sealed ticket set
body.description:
**Problem:** The end-to-end builder 'funnel' is currently a per-session ritual reconstructed by hand (see 07-05 slate). Every coding-loop change should get a funnel run the way every ticket gets proof-on-close — a standing, versioned metric, not a one-off.

**Proposed shape:** One command that runs a FIXED sealed ticket set (sealed via eval_slice.py) through the coding loop and appends a scoreboard row per run, recording per-ticket: gate-pass? plan produced? edits attempted? edits applied? tests green? DONE? + wall-clock/turn + model/arm label. Scoreboard is an append-only flat-file artifact (NO SQLite). Include ~5 EXTERNAL benchmark tasks (exercism-style), sealed the same way, to decouple 'harness improved' from 'our tickets got easier' (self-referential-eval smell Fable flagged; matches the grounding-spine's temporal-firewall discipline).

**Affected files:** new funnel runner under devlab/claudecode/ or unseen_university/devices/inference/; reuse eval_slice.py, io_corpus, architect_editor. MEDIUM inertia (new standing harness).
**Design rules:** NO SQLITE (flat-file scoreboard); Inference-Proxy-only; every-flag-stamps-io_corpus.
**Scope boundary:** the harness + scoreboard + sealed ticket set (internal + external slices). NOT the 2x2 arms — that is T-funnel-2x2-model-harness-confound, which consumes this.
**Test plan:** red->green — a run over a 1-ticket sealed set appends exactly one well-formed scoreboard row; a re-run appends (idempotent-append, not overwrite); an unknown/unsealed ticket id is rejected.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

**Completion criteria:**
- A single command runs the sealed ticket set (internal + ~5 external) through the coding loop and appends one well-formed scoreboard row per run.
- Scoreboard row carries per-ticket: gate-pass, plan-produced, edits-attempted, edits-applied, tests-green, DONE, wall-clock/turn, model/arm.
- Re-run appends (never overwrites); unknown/unsealed ticket id is rejected.
- Scoreboard is flat-file (no SQLite); internal vs external slices are distinguishable.
body.intention: I intend that every coding-loop change earns a funnel run the way every ticket earns proof-on-close — a standing, versioned builder metric instead of a hand-rebuilt ritual. Serves the compiled-inference measurement-loop-must-be-grounded telos.
